response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience and clear passion for testing, developer tooling, and knowledge sharing (workshops, open source test runners, CI/CD setup). However, the role requires 2+ years of formal people management and 3+ years of technical leadership in a manager capacity, neither of which appears on the resume — all roles are IC (Senior/Staff Developer). No mobile-platform ecosystem experience at scale, and no evidence of leading organizational change or managing direct reports.
strengths: Deep developer-tools background: built test runners (Trial), assertion libraries (Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD infrastructure, and Selenium training programs
15+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded — exceeds the 8-year minimum easily
Demonstrated craftsmanship culture: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, and active community teaching (workshops, dojos, talks)
concerns: No formal people-management experience — resume shows IC titles only, missing the 2-year people-leadership minimum
No clear technical leadership role (tech lead, staff-with-reports, EM) documented for the required 3 years
No mobile-platform ecosystem experience at the scale this role implies; iOS/Apple TV work at WatchUp is a decade old and small-team
